text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm taking a stroll in the park on my<n>day off,
when...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Argh?! Y-you have to be kidding me...<n>Am I in the
first circle of hell?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Ah, my salvation! I beg you, Trainer,<n>rescue me
from the misery of these<n>dark depths before I
succumb to<n>misfortune!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I was feeling groggy and dozed off on<n>the bench...
I only just woke up!<n>That's when...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I heard a crow caw four times above<n>my head!
That's definitely a sign<n>things will take a turn for
the worse!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
My mom always used to warn me to<n>come back
home before the crow's<n>first caw! It means
danger is just<n>around the corner!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
After an untimely encounter with an<n>omen of
misfortune,<n>Matikanefukukitaru seems to be
completely drained of energy...
